sentences.text: Monthly.
298 monthly.

A dollar a unit.

What's the difference between 85 cents and $1 a unit?

do they ever offer the 85 cents a unit?

Okay, so that… so that 600 units is regardless.
Yep.

Because….

it would be Roughly $700.

you'd be able to come back in and still look at One Manhattan.

Not current.

any property.

for this, like, sorry, Jeff, for this research part, what are we pulling from here that we, if that's separate from, you know, the two properties that we're adding, you know, like, from, like, let's say right now we have 55510 and OMS on there, like, what's the difference between this report versus the other, the other one?
It's the same exact reports.

Like, technically, you're not supposed to search your own properties, and just because you've been with us since 2022, it's a pretty substantial budget jump, like… It's not going to get caught, so you can come in and say you did want to swap that out, so you're moving… the new property, and keeping 555, you'd still be able to come in and do this with One Manhattan.

the way the current account is set up, is there one research sheet, or there's none at all?

would potentially like to move forward.
